column2: 將艦船傳送至戰鬥地圖上任一格,並使該艦取得最高先攻。

column1: A powerful engine modification capable of generating a spherical burst of phased energy striking all adjacent ships for up to 10 points of damage plus one per ship.
column2: 強力的引擎改裝,可生成球形相位能量爆發,對所有相鄰艦船造成至多 10 點傷害,每艘敵艦再 +1。

column1: Self-replenishing fuel that allows ships to move any distance from colony planets.
column2: 可自我補充的燃料,使艦船能離開殖民行星任意距離。

column1: Moves ships at warp eight (8 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class VIII in combat.
column2: 使艦船以曲速八(每回合 8 秒差距)移動,戰鬥中最高機動為 VIII 級。

column1: Surrounds colony planets with an intense gravity well, rendering sub space teleporters useless and halving combat transporter effectiveness. The device is a placed in all missile bases.
column2: 以強烈重力井環繞殖民行星,使次空間傳送器失效,並使戰鬥傳送器效果減半。此裝置會配置於所有飛彈基地。

column1: Transports equipped with these devices have a 50% chance of beaming down onto enemy surfaces before the transports can be attacked by enemy ships and bases.
column2: 裝有此裝置的運兵船,有 50% 機率在被敵方艦船與基地攻擊前先傳送登陸敵方表面。

column1: Generates a field that negates the inertia of ships and adds 2 classes of maneuverability in combat (+4 defense and +2 combat speed).
column2: 產生抵銷艦船慣性的力場,戰鬥中機動 +2 級(防禦 +4、戰鬥速度 +2)。

column1: Moves ships at warp nine (9 parsecs per turn), and allows a maximum maneuverability of class IX in combat.
column2: 使艦船以曲速九(每回合 9 秒差距)移動,戰鬥中最高機動為 IX 級。

column1: Randomly shifts the equipped ship in and out of normal space, allowing the ship to avoid one third of all non-area attacks.
column2: 使裝備艦隨機在正常空間中進出,可閃避三分之一的非範圍攻擊。

column1: Direct-fire beam weapon that inflicts 1-4 points of damage. Heavy lasers have a two space range and do 1-7 points of damage.
column2: 直射光束武器,造成 1-4 點傷害。重型雷射射程 2 格,造成 1-7 點傷害。

column1: Personal lasers that add 5 to your ground combat rolls.
column2: 個人雷射,地面戰判定 +5。

column1: Swift missiles that explode for 6 points of damage and move at a speed of 2.5
column2: 高速飛彈,爆炸造成 6 點傷害,速度 2.5。

column1: An advanced laser that fires up to four times per turn for 1-4 points of damage with each hit.
column2: 先進雷射,每回合最多發射四次,每次命中造成 1-4 點傷害。

column1: Trans-light rockets capable of destroying incoming enemy missiles 40% of the time, -1% per technology level of the missile.
column2: 超光速火箭,可摧毀來襲敵方飛彈,成功率 40%,每提高一級飛彈科技 -1%。

column1: Heavy particle stream weapon that halves the effectiveness of enemy deflector shields and inflicts 2-5 points of damage.
column2: 重型粒子流武器,使敵方偏導護盾效果減半,並造成 2-5 點傷害。

column1: Missiles equipped with high energy warheads that explode for 8 points of damage, move at a speed of 2.5, and are controlled by a +1 level targeting computer.
column2: 裝有高能彈頭的飛彈,爆炸造成 8 點傷害,速度 2.5,由 +1 級導引電腦控制。

column1: Bombs that explode for 5-20 points of damage on planetary targets only.
column2: 炸彈,僅對行星目標爆炸造成 5-20 點傷害。

column1: High intensity beam weapons capable of inflicting 3-8 points of damage. Heavy ion cannons strike for 3-15 and have a 2 space range.
column2: 高強度光束武器,可造成 3-8 點傷害。重型離子加農砲造成 3-15 點傷害,射程 2 格。

column1: Mirv versions of Hyper-V Rockets, splitting into five separate warheads that each explode for 6 points of damage and move at a speed of 2.5
column2: 超 V 火箭的分導彈頭版本,分裂為五枚獨立彈頭,每枚爆炸造成 6 點傷害,速度 2.5。

column1: Personal beam weapons that add 10 to your ground attacks.
column2: 個人光束武器,地面攻擊 +10。

column1: A linear accelerator that halves the effectiveness of enemy deflector shields and inflicts 5-8 points of damage.
column2: 線性加速器,使敵方偏導護盾效果減半,並造成 5-8 點傷害。

column1: Hard-hitting, swift missiles that explode for 10 points of damage, move at a speed of 3, and are controlled by a +2 level targeting computer.
column2: 強勁的高速飛彈,爆炸造成 10 點傷害,速度 3,由 +2 級導引電腦控制。

column1: High powered beam weapons capable of inflicting 3-12 points of damage. Heavy neutron blasters strike for 3-24 points and have a 2 space range.
column2: 高功率光束武器,可造成 3-12 點傷害。重型中子爆破槍造成 3-24 點傷害,射程 2 格。

column1: Bombs that explode for 10-40 points of damage on planetary targets only.
column2: 炸彈,僅對行星目標爆炸造成 10-40 點傷害。

column1: Tractor-repulsor beam capable of rending ships to pieces. The beam strikes for 1-15, and the continuous streaming effect of the ray allows damage to carry over from one ship to another.
column2: 可將艦船撕裂的牽引斥力光束,造成 1-15 點傷害。其持續光束效應使傷害可從一艘艦溢出至下一艘。

column1: Slow, hyper-accurate missiles that do 15 points of damage, move at a speed of 3.5, and are controlled by a sophisticated +3 level targeting computer.
column2: 緩慢但極為精準的飛彈,造成 15 點傷害,速度 3.5,由精密的 +3 級導引電腦控制。

column1: An energy-to-matter beam weapon that halves the effectiveness of enemy deflector shields, and inflicts 8-12 points of damage.
column2: 能量轉物質的光束武器,使敵方偏導護盾效果減半,並造成 8-12 點傷害。

column1: High intensity beam weapon capable of doing 4-16 points of damage. Heavy fusion beams strike for 4-30 points and have a 2 space range.

column1: Fires an intense ionic blast reducing an opponents armor by 20% plus 1% per two firing ships. The projector has a range of 2 spaces.
column2: 發射強烈離子爆能,使敵方裝甲減少 20%,每兩艘發射艦再 +1%。射程 2 格。

column1: High yield bombs that explode for 20-50 points of damage on planetary targets only.
column2: 高當量炸彈,僅對行星目標爆炸造成 20-50 點傷害。

column1: High energy tracking torpedoes that deliver 30 points of damage but may only be fired every other turn. Each torpedo is equipped with a +4 level targeting computer.

column1: Inaccurate but incredibly powerful beam weapons that add 20 to your ground combat rolls.
column2: 命中不佳但威力驚人的光束武器,地面戰判定 +20。

column1: Releases multiple bolts of pure energy in a wide field. It has a +30% bonus chance to hit and strikes for 2-20 points of damage.
column2: 在寬廣範圍內釋放多道純能量束。命中率 +30%,造成 2-20 點傷害。

column1: Phased energy beams capable of inflicting 5-20 points of damage. Heavy phasors strike for 5-40 points of damage and have a 2 space range.
column2: 相位能量光束,可造成 5-20 點傷害。重型相位砲造成 5-40 點傷害,射程 2 格。

column1: Mirv versions of Hyper-X Rockets, splitting into seven separate warheads that each explode for 10 points of damage, move at a speed of 3, and are guided by a +2 level targeting computer.

column1: An advanced neutron blaster that fires up to three times per turn for 4-16 points of damage with each hit.
column2: 先進的中子爆破槍,每回合最多發射三次,每次命中造成 4-16 點傷害。

column1: Powerful missiles equipped with anti-matter warheads that explode for 20 points of damage, move at speed 4, and are controlled by a +4 level targeting computer.
column2: 裝有反物質彈頭的強力飛彈,爆炸造成 20 點傷害,速度 4,由 +4 級導引電腦控制。

column1: Fires an intense stream of tachyon particles that strike enemy ships for 1-25 hits. The continous streaming effect of the ray allows it to carry damage over from one ship to another.

column1: Potent hand held energy weapons capable of reducing an opponent to his component atoms. Adds 25 to your ground combat rolls.
column2: 強力的手持能量武器,可將敵人分解為原子。地面戰判定 +25。

column1: An advanced linear accelerator capable of firing four explosive rounds per turn that inflict 7-10 points of damage each. The projectile rounds half the effectiveness of enemy shields.
column2: 先進的線性加速器,每回合可發射四發爆裂彈,每發造成 7-10 點傷害。彈藥使敵方護盾效果減半。

column1: High intensity particle accelerators capable of striking enemy ships for 10-20 points of damage and halving the effectiveness of deflector shields.
column2: 高強度粒子加速器,對敵艦造成 10-20 點傷害,並使偏導護盾效果減半。

column1: Highly advanced missile that explodes for 25 points of damage. The hercular missile moves at speed 4.5 and is controlled by a +5 level targeting computer.
column2: 高度先進的飛彈,爆炸造成 25 點傷害。赫剌克勒斯飛彈速度 4.5,由 +5 級導引電腦控制。

column1: Fires intense bolts of energy that inflict 6-30 points of damage.
column2: 發射強烈的能量束,造成 6-30 點傷害。

column1: An ancient weapon of unbelievably destructive power that inflicts 200-1000 points of damage with a 1 space range.
column2: 具有難以置信破壞力的遠古武器,造成 200-1000 點傷害,射程 1 格。

column1: Unleashes tremendous bolts of pure energy that can strike enemy targets up to 2 spaces away for 10-40 points of damage.
column2: 釋放巨大的純能量束,可打擊 2 格內的敵方目標,造成 10-40 點傷害。

column1: An advanced phasor capable of firing three bursts per turn for 5-20 points of damage with each hit.
column2: 先進的相位砲,每回合可發射三連射,每次命中造成 5-20 點傷害。

column1: Devastating bombs that explode for 40-70 points of damage on planets only.
column2: 毀滅性炸彈,僅對行星爆炸造成 40-70 點傷害。

column1: Enveloping energy torpedoes that simultaneously strike all shields, delivering damage equivalent to four 25 point attacks. They may only be fired once every other turn.
column2: 包覆式能量魚雷,可同時命中所有護盾,造成相當於四次 25 點攻擊的傷害。每隔一回合才能發射一次。

column1: Most advanced missile available. Capable of striking enemy ships for 30 points of damage and moving at a speed of 5. The zeon missile is guided by a +6 level targeting computer.
column2: 現有最先進的飛彈,對敵艦造成 30 點傷害,速度 5。澤恩飛彈由 +6 級導引電腦導引。

column1: The most devastating hand held weapon available. Adds 30 to your ground attacks.
column2: 現有最具毀滅性的手持武器。地面攻擊 +30。

column1: High yield energy torpedoes that deliver 75 points of damage but may only be fired every other turn. Each torpedo is equipped with a +6 level targeting computer.
column2: 高當量能量魚雷,造成 75 點傷害,但每隔一回合才能發射一次。每枚魚雷配備 +6 級導引電腦。

column1: Mirv versions of Stinger Missiles, splitting into ten separate warheads that each explode for 15 points of damage, move at speed 3.5, and are guided by a +3 level targeting computer.
column2: 毒刺飛彈的分導彈頭版本,分裂為十枚獨立彈頭,每枚爆炸造成 15 點傷害,速度 3.5,由 +3 級導引電腦控制。

column1: Fires a triad of high intensity plasma beams capable of inflicting 20-50 points of damage.
column2: 發射三道高強度電漿光束,可造成 20-50 點傷害。

column1: Surrounds the target with an extremely powerful matter-energy conversion field, inflicting four 10-35 point attacks.  It has a range of 3 spaces.
column2: 以極強的物質-能量轉換場包圍目標,造成四次 10-35 點攻擊。射程 3 格。

column1: Fires a blast of concentrated neutrino rays reducing an opponents armor by 40% plus 1% per firing ship. The projector has a range of 2 spaces.
column2: 發射集中的微中子射線爆能,使敵方裝甲減少 40%,每艘發射艦再 +1%。射程 2 格。

column1: Unleashes enormous amounts of focused energy at enemy targets, inflicting 20-100 points of damage.
column2: 向敵方目標釋放巨量聚焦能量,造成 20-100 點傷害。

column1: Pure energy torpedoes that deliver 150 points of damage, but lose 15 strength per space traveled. The launcher fires every other turn and has a +7 level guidance computer.
column2: 純能量魚雷,造成 150 點傷害,但每飛行一格損失 15 點威力。發射器每隔一回合發射一次,配備 +7 級導引電腦。
